revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23177433986|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Copy_edit%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Redirect|Template:Spacing|inline spacing templates|Template:Inline spacing templates}} {{High-use}} {{Twinkle standard installation}} {{Never substitute}} {{tsh|c/e}} == Usage == This template tags an article for [[Wikipedia:Basic copyediting|copy editing]] and should be added at the top of the article page, as follows: :{{tnull|Copy edit|for=|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} This template will auto-categorize tagged articles into [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing copy edit]], or a dated subcategory thereof. Do not [[Wikipedia:Substitution|subst:]] this template. This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Self-references to avoid|self-reference]]. Do not add this template to drafts. === Optional parameters === * This template takes an optional parameter that replaces the word "article" in the displayed message with arbitrary text. For example, {{tnull|Copy edit|section}} displays "This section needs [[Wikipedia:Basic copyediting|copy editing]]." * This template takes the optional parameter {{para|for}} (a.k.a. {{para|reason}}) which can be used to explain what issues need to be addressed, e.g. {{para|for|consistent spelling}}. The default value is "grammar, style, cohesion, tone, or spelling". * This template takes the optional parameter {{para|date}}, with the format {{para|date|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}. A bot will automatically fill the parameter if it is initially left empty. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Use this cleanup template to tag an article for copy editing, such as for grammar, style, cohesion, tone or spelling.", "format": "inline", "params": { "1": { "label": "Affected area", "type": "string", "autovalue": "section", "suggestedvalues": [ "section" ], "default": "article" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "for": { "aliases": [ "reason" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "Text to replace \"grammar, style, cohesion, tone, or spelling\" in the template", "type": "string" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1", "for" ] } == Tracking categories == * {{clc|All Wikipedia articles needing copy edit}} == Other templates that add pages to {{cl|Wikipedia articles needing copy edit}} == * {{Tl|Copy edit inline}} * {{Tl|Copy edit section}} * {{tl|Inappropriate person}} == Redirects == {{columns-list|colwidth=15em| #{{Tl|Ced}} #{{Tl|Cleanup-copyedit}} #{{Tl|Cleanup-english}} #{{Tl|Copy-edit}} #{{tl|Copyedit}} #{{Tl|Copyediting}} #{{Tl|Gcheck}} #{{Tl|Grammar}} #{{tl|Grammar check}} #{{Tl|Spacing}} #{{tl|Spelling}} #{{tl|Repetition}} #{{tl|Verbosity}} }} == See also == * {{Tl|Tone}} * {{Tl|Verify spelling}} * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Cleanup]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Guild of Copy Editors]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
